Seit 1998 kochen wir mit Leidenschaft un: Since 1998 we have cooked with passion and fresh regional ingredients.
Seit 2004 Ihr Handwerker für Renovierung: Since 2004 your tradesman for renovation, electrics and bathrooms: master quality, clean work and fair fixed prices. Describe your project online — you'll receive a no-obligation quote.
Seit 2012 verwöhnen wir Sie mit modernen: Since 2012 we've treated you to modern cuts, gentle colours and honest advice. Book your preferred appointment conveniently online.
Seit 2015 rösten wir unseren Espresso be: Since 2015 we've roasted our espresso at a small local roastery and bake fresh every morning. Breakfast is served until 2 pm, with a changing lunch special on Fridays. With the coffee pass, your seventh coffee is free.
Seit 2016 schaffen wir Räume zum Durchat: Since 2016 we've created spaces to breathe — at the edge of the forest near Freiburg. Small groups, experienced guidance, honest mindfulness without esoteric kitsch.
Seit 2017 zeigen wir unsere Stadt so, wi: Since 2017 we've shown our city the way guidebooks never do: backyards, craftsmanship, anecdotes. Public tours start daily at the town hall, and we guide private groups on request — in English too. For excursions and wine tastings there are tickets with a fixed number of places.
